response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role explicitly demands a C++ specialist with deep STL, multi-threading, message-broker, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) expertise. C++ appears only briefly in a 2014-2015 stint at National Instruments, and there is no evidence of MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, SDL practices, or industrial automation work. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which doesn't align with the core C++ architect mandate.
strengths: 12+ years of software engineering experience across multiple domains
Strong background in testable, modular design (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a measurement IDE
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience — only ~6 months in 2014-2015
No evidence of IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity work
No demonstrated MQTT, message-broker, or industrial protocol (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) experience

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial automation and protocol expertise
Strong general software craftsmanship and architecture background
